meta.title: AI for Good by DeepLearning.AI Now Available
meta.description:
Enroll now! https://bit.ly/4p5rJOY

In AI for Good, our three-course specialization built in collaboration with the Microsoft AI for Good lab and instructed by Robert Monarch, you’ll learn a framework for contributing to AI-powered initiatives that drive positive change. You'll also hear from experts leading AI for Good projects that help mitigate climate change, support disaster response, and improve public health.

After taking our specialization, you’ll have the tools and knowledge to lead, develop, and contribute to AI for good projects in the real world. You’ll have the ability to understand how organizations around the world are using AI to help their initiatives and apply lessons from experienced AI experts to your own projects and initiatives. 

In creating this program we worked with Microsoft’s AI for Good Lab and lead instructor Robert Monarch, author of Human-in-the-Loop Machine Learning, a disaster response professional, who now works in machine learning at Apple.

AI for Good is for everyone who wants to harness the power of human and artificial intelligence to address real-world challenges. 

Learn more: https://bit.ly/4p5rJOY
